c74object.name: clap~
c74object.digest: Real-time zero-shot audio classification using laion/clap-htsat-fused
c74object.description: Real-time zero-shot audio classification using laion/clap-htsat-fused.

objarg.name: model
objarg.digest: Path to model directory or clap_tilde_audio_*.onnx
objarg.description: Path to model directory or clap_tilde_audio_*.onnx. Optional — auto-detected if omitted.

objarg.name: device
objarg.description: Inference device: 'cpu' or 'mps'. Optional, defaults to 'cpu'.

method.name: clear_example
method.digest: clear_example — remove the few-shot example for a specific label
method.description: clear_example — remove the few-shot example for a specific label.

method.name: clear_examples
method.digest: Remove all recorded few-shot audio examples
method.description: Remove all recorded few-shot audio examples.

method.name: record
method.digest: record — register a few-shot audio example from a buffer~
method.description: record — register a few-shot audio example from a buffer~.

method.name: add_class
method.digest: Append class names to the current set without clearing existing ones
method.description: Append class names to the current set without clearing existing ones.

method.name: record_multi
method.digest: record_multi — register a few-shot prototype by averaging all slots of a polybuffer~
method.description: record_multi — register a few-shot prototype by averaging all slots of a polybuffer~.

method.name: classnames
method.digest: Output current class names via dumpout
method.description: Output current class names via dumpout.

method.name: set_classes
method.digest: Set class names for zero-shot CLAP inference
method.description: Set class names for zero-shot CLAP inference. Separate class names with a comma atom. Example (message box): set_class violin pizzicato , flute multiphonics

method.name: set
method.digest: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read
method.description: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read.

attribute.name: confidence
attribute.digest: Minimum confidence (0.–1.) to output a class; below threshold outputs 'no_confidence'
attribute.description: Minimum confidence (0.–1.) to output a class; below threshold outputs 'no_confidence'.

attribute.name: context
attribute.digest: Audio context window for inference in milliseconds
attribute.description: Audio context window for inference in milliseconds. Longer windows capture more temporal structure but increase latency. Re-exports the model are not required — context is set at runtime.

attribute.name: enabled
attribute.description: Enable or disable classification. When enabled 1 the model is running.

attribute.name: sensitivityrange
attribute.digest: Time window in ms for sensitivity scaling (0–2000)
attribute.description: Time window in ms for sensitivity scaling (0–2000).

attribute.name: threshold
attribute.digest: Minimum energy in dB required for classification (-80–0)
attribute.description: Minimum energy in dB required for classification (-80–0).

attribute.name: window
attribute.digest: Sliding window size in ms for energy thresholding
attribute.description: Sliding window size in ms for energy thresholding.
